# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        skipDefaultCheckout true
        buildDiscarder(
            disableTimeout(true)
        )
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        lock { label 'master' }
        skipStagesAfterUnstable()
        timeout(time: 10, unit: 'MINUTES')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Clean Workspace') {
            steps {
                deleteDir()
            }
        }
        stage('Checkout Code') {
            steps {
                git branch: 'main', credentialsId: 'cicd-credentials', url: 'https://github.com/your-repo.git'
            }
        }
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                sh 'mvn clean package -Dmaven.test.failure.ignore=true'
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                sh 'mvn test'
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                sh 'mvn deploy'
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            emailext body: 'Build successful', subject: 'Jenkins Build Success',
                    to: 'your-email@example.com'
        }
        failure {
            emailext body: 'Build failed', subject: 'Jenkins Build Failure',
                    to: 'your-email@example.com'
        }
    }

    environment {
        CICD_SECURITY_DISABLED = true
    }
}
